_meta.description: Image treatments per mood — CSS filter, clip-path, border/shadow frames, hover effects, aspect ratios
_meta.usage: Primijeni na sve i elemente. Svaki mood ima drugačiji vizualni tretman slika.

img-brutalist.name: Brutalist Frame
img-brutalist.description: Crni debeli border + offset shadow. Slike su 'uhvaćene' u okvir.
img-brutalist.container_css: border: 3px solid var(--text); box-shadow: 6px 6px 0 var(--text); overflow: hidden; display: block;
img-brutalist.img_css: display: block; width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; filter: contrast(1.05);
img-brutalist.grayscale_option: grayscale(100%) — za hero background ili dekorativne slike

img-glassmorphism.name: Glass Glow Frame
img-glassmorphism.description: Slike imaju glow border i subtle blur frame. Plutaju.
img-glassmorphism.container_css: border-radius: 16px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.4), 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.1); position: relative;
img-glassmorphism.img_css: display: block; width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover;
img-glassmorphism.hover_css: box-shadow: 0 25px 70px rgba(0,0,0,0.5), 0 0 0 1px var(--primary), 0 0 30px var(--primary-glow); transform: translateY(-4px);
img-glassmorphism.overlay: ::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(15,12,41,0.7) 0%, transparent 60%); pointer-events: none; }

img-neobrutalist.name: Neobrutalist Offset
img-neobrutalist.description: Debeli border + offset shadow koji se pomjera na hover. Signature neobrutalism.
img-neobrutalist.container_css: border: 2px solid var(--text); box-shadow: 5px 5px 0 var(--text); overflow: hidden; border-radius: 8px; transition: transform 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s;
img-neobrutalist.img_css: display: block; width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; transition: transform 0.3s;
img-neobrutalist.badge_option: Dodaj rotiran badge iznad slike: NEW — transform: rotate(-3deg), background: var(--primary), border: 2px solid var(--text)

img-editorial.name: Editorial Minimal
img-editorial.description: Nema border. Slike govore same. Grayscale na hover ili obratno.
img-editorial.img_css: display: block; width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; filter: grayscale(20%); transition: filter 0.4s ease, transform 0.6s ease;
img-editorial.caption_style: font: var(--font-body); font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--text-muted); font-style: italic; padding-top: 8px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border);

img-luxury.name: Luxury Cinematic
img-luxury.description: Tamni vinjete, zlatni tanki border, filmski aspect ratio.
img-luxury.container_css: overflow: hidden; position: relative; border: 1px solid rgba(201,169,110,0.3);
img-luxury.img_css: display: block; width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; filter: brightness(0.9) contrast(1.05); transition: transform 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.25,0.46,0.45,0.94);
img-luxury.overlay: ::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent 40%, rgba(10,8,4,0.6) 100%), radial-gradient(ellipse at center, transparent 50%, rgba(10,8,4,0.3) 100%); pointer-events: none; }
img-luxury.golden_border_option: ::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 8px; border: 1px solid rgba(201,169,110,0.2); pointer-events: none; z-index: 1; }

img-cyberpunk.name: Neon Glitch Frame
img-cyberpunk.description: Neon border glow, duotone opcija, scanline overlay.
img-cyberpunk.container_css: position: relative; border: 1px solid var(--primary); box-shadow: 0 0 15px var(--primary-glow), inset 0 0 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); overflow: hidden;
img-cyberpunk.img_css: display: block; width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; filter: saturate(1.2) contrast(1.1); transition: filter 0.3s;
img-cyberpunk.scanline_overlay: ::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, transparent, transparent 2px, rgba(0,0,0,0.08) 2px, rgba(0,0,0,0.08) 4px); pointer-events: none; z-index: 1; }
img-cyberpunk.corner_accent: ::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 20px; height: 20px; border-top: 2px solid var(--primary); border-left: 2px solid var(--primary); z-index: 2; }

img-organic.name: Organic Blob Mask
img-organic.description: Blob clip-path za organski oblik. Topla saturacija.
img-organic.img_css: display: block; width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; filter: saturate(1.1); transition: transform 0.6s ease, border-radius 0.6s ease;

img-pastel.name: Pastel Soft Frame
img-pastel.description: Zaobljeno, soft shadow, pastelni tint overlay na hover.
img-pastel.img_css: display: block; width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; transition: transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1);
img-pastel.tint_option: ::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: rgba(192,132,252,0.1); opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.3s; } :hover::after { opacity: 1; }

img-swiss.name: Swiss Grid Frame
img-swiss.description: Nema border, nema efekta. Slike u strogom grid-u. Crno-bijela opcija.
img-swiss.img_css: display: block; width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; transition: transform 0.3s ease;
img-swiss.red_overlay_option: ::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: var(--primary); mix-blend-mode: multiply; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.3s; } :hover::after { opacity: 0.3; }

img-darktech.name: Dark Tech Panel
img-darktech.description: Gradient overlay s dna, subtle border, tech osjećaj.
img-darktech.container_css: border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid var(--border); position: relative;
img-darktech.img_css: display: block; width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; transition: transform 0.4s ease;
img-darktech.gradient_overlay: ::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(15,23,42,0.8) 0%, transparent 50%); pointer-events: none; }
img-darktech.badge_overlay: Dodaj tech badge u corner: position: absolute; top: 12px; right: 12px; background: rgba(59,130,246,0.2); border: 1px solid var(--primary); padding: 4px 10px; font-size: 0.65rem; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase;

placeholder_patterns.note: Kad nema slike, koristi ove placeholder stilove umjesto sive kutije
placeholder_patterns.brutalist: background: var(--surface); border: 3px solid var(--text); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-weight: 900; font-size: 4rem; color: var(--primary); text-transform: uppercase;
placeholder_patterns.neobrutalism: background: var(--primary); border: 2px solid var(--text); box-shadow: 4px 4px 0 var(--text); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
placeholder_patterns.glassmorphism: background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
placeholder_patterns.luxury: background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid rgba(201,169,110,0.2); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
placeholder_patterns.darktech: background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; position: relative; overflow: hidden; background-image: linear-gradient(rgba(59,130,246,0.03) 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(59,130,246,0.03) 1px, transparent 1px); background-size: 20px 20px;
